VERDUN
minting_now.description:
VERDUN
An artistic image that contrasts the imagination between two worlds: peace (the swing) and war.
This is a dynamic NFTs video from my own AI stamp collection : https://opensea.io/collection/philately-ai-stamp-collection
An open, ongoing edition for philately enthusiasts.
NFT's stamps (some Err

minting_now.name: DIVINE MINERS
minting_now.description: DIVINE MINERS is an independent, transformed collection built upon the CC0 NORMIES project. All artworks have been reimagined and animated. Also released under CC0.

minting_now.name: flake cat
minting_now.description:
子供が描いた一匹の猫。
実際にシールにして、フレークのようにちりばめて遊んでいます。
デジタルの世界でも、この「flake cat」が誰かのお気に入りになりますように。
A cat drawn by my child.
I use these as real "flake stickers" on my phone case.
I hope this digital "flake cat" will find a place in your heart too.

minting_now.name: Havoc Prime
minting_now.description:
An open-world experience where onchain characters unlock premium gameplay, identity, and progression.
A next-gen web3 game, built on ETH.

minting_now.name: Tiny Turtles
minting_now.description: A collection of 10,000 hand drawn cute turtles on Ethereum

minting_now.name: BurgersGang
minting_now.description:
